positive: A cyberpunk cityscape at night, viewed through a rainy window. Neon signs reflecting off wet pavement, glowing Japanese kanji, flying vehicles, high contrast, synthwave aesthetic, vaporwave colors (magenta, cyan, deep blue), cinematic lighting, 8k resolution.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural sunlight, pastoral, watercolor, cartoonish
